commands.repair_reason: This external PR needs contributor proof and maintainer-guided split/replacement because the remaining blockers are security-sensitive and cross multiple Google Chat behaviors, not a safe automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff introduces concrete Google Chat auth, access-control, and sensitive logging regressions.; Review finding: [P1] Keep add-on tokens bound to appPrincipal — extensions/googlechat/src/a... commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Google Chat auth, webhook parsing, inbound access policy, message processing, outbound delivery/threading, and an old core dock fallback to add Space/Add-on handling, 60-second dedupe, and default reply-to-all behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review blockers: the PR head and current-main source show the auth binding removal, sender-policy downgrade, broad BOT mention match, raw logging, dedupe, and lifecycle defects. I did not run live Google Chat traffic in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This external PR needs contributor proof and maintainer-guided split/replacement because the remaining blockers are security-sensitive and cross multiple Google Chat behaviors, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: (googlechat) fix: space messaging, introduce deduplication, and update reply-to defaults
